hero.heading: Every cup has a story worth knowing.
hero.description: Explore the world of specialty coffee — from the farms of Ethiopia to the hills of Colombia. Discover new beans, master your brew, and build a passion that lasts.

features.heading: Everything a coffee lover needs
features.subheading: One place to discover, learn, track, and connect.

items.title: Brew Discovery
items.description: Explore specialty beans from around the world, filtered by origin, roast level, and flavour profile. Find your next favourite cup.

items.title: Preference Tracker
items.description: Log every cup you try. Rate flavours, note your brewing method, and watch your personal taste profile take shape over time.

items.title: Learn Origins
items.description: Dive deep into the stories behind each bean — the farmers, the regions, the climate, and the sustainable practices that make specialty coffee possible.

items.title: Cafe Locator
items.description: Find local cafes that carry Can Crops beans near you. Support independent roasters and specialty shops in your city.

origins.heading: Trace every cup to its source
origins.subheading: Can Crops sources directly from farms and co-operatives in four of the world's finest coffee-growing regions.

items.profile: Floral aroma with bright citrus sweetness and a delicate tea-like body. Known as the birthplace of Arabica coffee.
items.sustainability: Smallholder co-operatives with shade-grown, organic-certified practices.

items.profile: Bold blackcurrant notes with wine-like acidity, full body, and a complex finish. A true connoisseur's cup.
items.sustainability: AA-graded beans under Kenya Coffee Council standards. Farmer co-operatives with fair trade pricing.

items.profile: Caramel sweetness, bright acidity, red apple notes, and a smooth medium body. Grown in Colombia's celebrated Coffee Belt.
items.sustainability: High-altitude volcanic soil farming. Multi-generational family farms with sustainable water management.

items.profile: Sweet cocoa, hazelnut, and caramel. Low acidity with a full, syrupy body. Brazil's most celebrated specialty regions.
items.sustainability: Natural processing reduces water usage. Multi-generational farms in protected environmental zones.

brewing.heading: Master your brewing method
brewing.subheading: The same bean tastes different depending on how you brew it. Learn which method unlocks the best in each Can Crops origin.

items.description: Clean, bright, and precise. The pour over highlights delicate floral and citrus notes — ideal for light roasts like Ethiopia Yirgacheffe.
Full-bodied and rich. The immersion method extracts deep chocolatey and nutty flavours — perfect for medium-dark Brazilian beans.
Concentrated and intense. High pressure extraction produces a thick, syrupy shot with complex crema. Best with dark roasts.
items.best_for: Brazil Mantissa Red Catuai, Colombia Caldas

items.description: Smooth and versatile. Fast pressure brewing produces a clean, low-acidity cup that works brilliantly across all roast levels.
Slow, cold extraction brings out natural sweetness and dramatically reduces bitterness. Silky smooth served over ice.
Bold and stovetop-brewed. Strong, espresso-adjacent with a rich mouthfeel. A staple of traditional coffee culture.
items.best_for: Kenya AA, Brazil Mantissa Red Catuai

sustainability.heading: Good coffee, grown responsibly
sustainability.subheading: Can Crops partners only with farms that prioritise people, land, and long-term quality.

pillars.title: Fair Trade Sourcing
pillars.description: We pay above-market prices directly to farmers and co-operatives, ensuring fair wages and long-term viability for growing communities.

pillars.title: Organic Practices
pillars.description: Our Ethiopian and Colombian partners use organic-certified methods — no synthetic pesticides, shade-grown canopy, and composted soil.

pillars.title: Water Conservation
pillars.description: Natural processing methods used in Brazil significantly reduce water consumption compared to conventional washed processing.

pillars.title: Climate Resilience
pillars.description: We invest in varietal research and farm adaptation programs to help growers build resilience against shifting weather patterns.

community.heading: Join a community of coffee lovers
community.subheading: Coffee Companion is more than an app. It's where curiosity meets craft.

shop.heading: Ready to brew? Shop Can Crops beans.
shop.subheading: Every bean you discover in Coffee Companion is available to order directly from Can Crops Inc. — roasted to order, shipped fresh.
shop.note: Wholesale and B2B inquiries welcome. Contact us for bulk pricing and custom roasting.

footer.tagline: Coffee Companion is powered by Can Crops Inc.
